name: Churu Cat Treats Chicken Variety 20 Tubes
description: Treat your cat to the irresistible taste and creamy texture they crave with the Churu 20-Count Chicken Variety Pack . Made with wholesome, high-quality ingredients you can trust , these lickable purée treats turn snack time into a bonding experience while supporting your cat’s hydration and overall wellbeing. Each tube is crafted using farm-raised chicken and carefully selected natural ingredients, delivering a delicious reward that’s both nutritious and low in calories. With 91% moisture and only 6 calories per tube , Churu treats are a smart choice for daily indulgence without guilt. Why Cats (and Cat Parents) Love Churu: High Moisture for Hydration: Helps keep cats hydrated, especially those who don’t drink enough water Low-Calorie Treat: Only 6 kcal per tube—about one-tenth the calories of traditional dry treats Clean, Simple Recipe: Free from grains, preservatives, artificial colors, and carrageenan Added Taurine & Vitamin E: Supports heart health, vision, and immune function Interactive Feeding: Perfect for hand-feeding, food topping, or disguising medication Flavor Variety Included (20 Tubes): Chicken Recipe ×5 Chicken with Scallop ×5 Chicken with Cheese ×5 Chicken with Shrimp Flavor ×5 Suitable for cats of all life stages , from playful kittens to senior companions, this variety pack keeps treat time exciting and satisfying. Guaranteed Analysis Crude Protein (min): 7.00% Crude Fat (min): 0.20% Crude Fiber (max): 0.30% Moisture (max): 91.00% Vitamin E (min): 310 IU/kg Taurine (min): 0.025% Calorie Content: 430 kcal/kg | 6.0 kcal per tube (ME) Net Weight: 10.0 oz (0.5 oz × 20 tubes) Feeding Instructions Feed as a treat only. Not intended as a complete meal. Always provide clean, fresh water and consult your veterinarian regularly. Storage Instructions Refrigerate after opening and serve as soon as possible.
